1. Aries - 7/10 - Natural leaders, but impulsive decisions can harm scores.
2. Taurus - 8/10 - Practical and reliable, but may be too focused on material possessions.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Quick-witted and adaptable, but scatterbrained and forgetful at times.
4. Cancer - 6/10 - Emotional and nurturing, but overly sensitive to criticism.
5. Leo - 8/10 - Confident and charismatic, but can be prideful and domineering.
6. Virgo - 9/10 - Analytical and hardworking, but perfectionistic and critical of others.
7. Libra - 7/10 - Diplomatic and social, but indecisive and overly concerned with appearances.
8. Scorpio - 8/10 - Passionate and intense, but can be overly possessive and jealous.
9. Sagittarius - 9/10 - Optimistic and adventurous, but reckless and prone to telling tall tales.
10. Capricorn - 6/10 - Ambitious and disciplined, but too focused on achievement and may neglect personal relationships.
11. Aquarius - 8/10 - Humanitarian and independent, but can be aloof and detached from others.
12. Pisces - 5/10 - Compassionate and imaginative, but overly emotional and prone to daydreaming.
